extra.message: User input from request parameter 'username' is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string via from_string(). This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) where an attacker can inject Jinja2 template syntax (e.g., {{7*7}} or {{config}}) to execute arbitrary code, access sensitive configuration data, or achieve remote code execution.

cwe: CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
